headlines.headline: Urvel Grid reports strong demand in Latin America, raises outlook

sentiment.reasoning: Raising outlook based on strong regional demand provides a clear positive signal for both immediate and medium-term financial performance.

headlines.headline: Pleven Trading Co warns of supply chain disruptions affecting North America operations

headlines.headline: Joval Brands names new head of precision manufacturing division

sentiment.reasoning: Appointing a new division head is a standard leadership change with neutral immediate financial impact and high uncertainty regarding future strategic execution.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
